rules.summary: Security deposit refund or deduction rules may be unclear.
rules.why_risky: Ambiguous refund timing or deduction standards can reduce or delay refund.
rules.suggested_question: Can refund deadline, itemized deductions, and proof requirements be added?
false_positive_checks: check whether the refund timeline appears in termination or handover terms

rules.summary: Maintenance or utility responsibility may need clearer allocation.
rules.why_risky: Unclear split of owner/tenant obligations can cause recurring disputes.
rules.suggested_question: Can owner and tenant duties for repairs, utilities, and association charges be split clearly?
false_positive_checks: check whether responsibilities are split across multiple clauses
